INNOVATION PORTFOLIO

Innovation and R&D portfolio for custom power solutions.

Our engineering capability covers transformers, reactors, control panels, battery chargers and custom electrical assemblies. From design and manufacturing to testing and documentation, Dynalektric supports OEMs, utilities and industrial customers with reliable power solutions.

Focus areas

Four programmes, one engineering team.

Hover any focus area to see programme deliverables in active development.

01
Focus Area

Traction Product Development

Engineering and development of traction and auxiliary power products supporting railway and mobility applications.

  • + Locomotive Transformer
  • + Metro Coach Traction Transformer
  • + Vande Bharat Traction Transformer
  • + Battery Charger
  • + Converter (Traction, Auxiliary & Hotel)
In-house engineering+
02
Focus Area

Renewable Product Development

Power products and grid interface solutions supporting renewable energy and battery storage applications.

  • + Inverter Duty Transformer
  • + BESS Power Pack – Pre-Engineered Grid Interface for BESS Container Deployment
In-house engineering+
03
Focus Area

IoT & Communication Systems

Monitoring and communication platforms enabling intelligent power management and remote diagnostics.

  • + Distributed Power with Communication System
  • + On-board Remote Monitoring System
  • + CAN Bus & IoT for MHE Chargers
In-house engineering+
04
Focus Area

Power Modules & Integrated Power Systems

Integrated power conversion modules and power supply systems for industrial and mobility applications.

  • + SMPS Power Supplies
  • + Redundant Power Supplies
  • + Converters
  • + DC-DC Converters
In-house engineering+
Engineering workflow

How a Dynalektric project moves.

01

Brief and specification

Application, load profile, environment and compliance requirements.

02

Technical review and proposal

Engineering review, technical feasibility and commercial proposal based on customer requirements.

03

Design and engineering

Electrical, mechanical and application-specific engineering based on customer requirements.

04

Prototype and test

Manufacturing, assembly, inspection and testing according to project requirements.

05

Series production

Production, documentation, dispatch and after-sales support.

Custom engineering

Have a non-standard requirement?

Our engineering team supports customer-specific requirements with technical review, product customization and manufacturing support for industrial, railway and power applications.

Magnetics, control panels, power electronics and cross-segment components. Engineered in India for industrial, power, railway, renewable and material handling applications worldwide.
